Levi miten vang nalah-uva gam aneilou diu ahi; ijeh-inem itile Pakai dia themputna hi amaho goulo achanu ahitai, chule Gad phungle Reuben phung ahin, Manas’seh phung keh khat ahiuvin, Pakai lhachapa Mose’n apehsa Jordan vadung gal lam gamsunga achan diu akilah tauve,” ati.

Mi thum chu akipatdoh-uvin, achetauvin ahi; gamsung umdol jih doh dinga che ho chu Joshua’n phaten athu lhah soh keiyin hitin aseiye, “Agamsung khu gasuh khol gatou kholuvin lang aumdol gajih doh soh keiyun lang kahenga hung kit tauvin, chutengle keiman nangho din hikom Shiloh muna hin Pakai angsunga vang san inge,” ati.

Hijeh chun mi thum chu acheuvin agamsung gasuh khol gatou kholun, agamsung chu akho len ho pum pumin lekhabu sunga chan sagin ahin hom’un ahinjih doh-uvin ahi; chujou chun Joshua henga ahungun Shiloh ngahmun ahung lhung tauve.
Chuin Joshua’n jong Shiloh muna chun miho din Pakai angsunga vang asanpeh tai, chujongleh Joshua’n Israel chate chu amichang cheh-in agamsung chu ahop peh tan ahi.
Vang kisan chu Benjamin phung din ainsung dungjui bang bangin ahungdoh tan ahileh, achan diu gam chu Judah phungle Joseph phung gamgi kikah a chang tauve.

Sah lama agamgi diu chu Jordan vadunga akipantai; hikoma pat chun agamgi chu Jericho khopi sah lama lhangkhat geiyin akilhungdoh peh-in, nilhum lama thinglhang gamsung geiyin achedoh peh kit’in, chuin Beth’aven gammanga atangtai.

Beth’aven gammanga kon chu agamgi chu lhang lam jonin akilhungsuh pai kit’in Luz lang ajonsuh-in, Luz lhang khat aman tai; Luz kiti hi Bethel jong ahiye, chujouvin agamgi chu At’aroth-addor lam ajonsuh in, noinung Beth’horon lhang lama molsang chunga aki-golsuh peh-e.

Chuin agamgi chun achomlam alhah kit ‘in lhang lam molsang chunga kon hin lhang lam nilhum lang ajonin Beth’boron to akigal dot peh-in, Judah phung mite khopi Kir’iath-jearim kiti Kir’iath-baal khopia chun atangtai. Hiche gamgi hi nilhum lam gamgia pang ahiye.
Lhang lam gamgi chu Kir’iath-je’arim khopama akipan pai tai; hichea konin agamgi akilhung in Ephron kiti lai Nephto’ah twibula chun alut tan ahi.

Chuin gamgi chu Hinnom chapa phaichama kitouvet molsang geiyin akilhung suh paiyin ahi; hiche Hinnom chapa phaicham hi Rephaim phaicham sah lam pamchin ahiye. Hichun Hinnom phai ajotsuh paikit’in Jebus mite lhanglam molbah khat amanpan, En-rogel geiyin akilhungsuh peh-e.

Chujouvin sah lam ngan akihei tan kit’in, En-shemesh ajontouvin, chua pat’in Geli’loth lama achei; Geli’loth kiti hi Adum’mim langa kaltouna toh kigalsai ahitai. Hichea kon chun agamgi chu Reuben chapa Bohan gamgi song phung geiyin akilhung peh-in ahi.
Chuin sah lama Beth’arabath lhangbah khat alhah tou kit’in, agamgi chu Arabah a ahung leng lhai;

agamgi chu akilhung tou pai paiyin, Beth’hoglah lhangbah khat ajuipeh-in, chujouvin Jordan lhanglama akingahna vatoa chikhuh twilen veikollai, sah lama amonga chun agamgi akichaitai. Hichan hi lhang lam gamgia pang ahi.
Niso lama chun Jordan vadung gamgin apange. Benjamin phung mite ama ama insung dungjui cheh a akimvel’uva gamgi, agamgia akisimsoh keiya ahileh hichanse se hi agoulou gamsung anahi.
Benjamin chate khopi ho chu ama ama insung dungjui cheh-in aban a ho hi ahi; Jericho ahin, Beth’hoglah ahi; Emek’ke’ziz ahin,
Beth’arabah ahi; Zemara’im ahin, Bethel ahi;
Avvim ahin, Parah ahi; Oph’rah ahin,
Chephar’am’moni ahi; Ophni ahin, Geba ahi; khopi som le ni alhingin akhoneo jouse toh ahithai;
Gibeon ahin, Ramah ahi; Be’er’oth ahin,
Mizpeh ahin, Chephi’rah ahi; Mozah ahin,
Rekem ahi; Irpeel ahin, Tar’alah ahi;

Zela ahin, Ha’eleph ahi; Jebus khopi Jerusalem hung kiti jong ahin, Gibe’ah ahi; chujongle Kir’iath’je’arim jong ahin, abonin khopi som le li toh khoneo jouse jong ahithai. Hicheng hi ainsung dungjui cheh-a Benjamin phung goulo achanu ahiye.
Vang kisan ani lhina hungdoh kit chu Simeon phung mina hungdoh ahin, Simeon chate goula achan diu gam chu Judah chate goula gam lailung tah ahikhai.
Amaho chan ding chu Beersheba ahin, Sheba ahi. Moladah ahin,
Hazar’shual Balah ahi; Ezem ahin,
Elto’lad toh ahi; Bethul ahin, Hormah ahi;
Ziklag ahin, Beth’marca’both ahi; Ha’zar’su’sah ahi;
Beth’leba’oth ahin, chule Sharu’hen toh ahi; abonin khopi som le thum toh khoneo chengse toh ahithai;
En’rimmon le Ether toh chule Ashan toh ahin, khopi li le akhoneo se toh ahi;
Chujongle khopi hicheng kimvela cheng khoneo jouse pum ahin, Ba’alathbeer toh Negeb gama Ramah chan gei peh ahithai. Hiche hi Simeon chate ainsung dungjuiya agoulo achanu anahi.
Simeon chate goula gam hi Judah gamsunga kona kisimdoh ahiye; ijehinem itileh Judah chate gamsung alet behseh jeh a Simeon chaten amaho gamsunga kona goulo ding chan akitedoh-u ahi.
Vang kisan athum lhinna Zebulun chate din ahungdoh-in, ainsung dungjuiya achan diuvin ahung doh tai. Amaho chan ding agoulou gamgi chu Sarid geipeh-in ahung kilhung lut peh-in ahi.
Agamgi chu nilhum langa akilhung touvin, Mar’eal geiyin achen, Dab’besheth ahopan, chuin niso lama Jok’ne-am kiti vadung ajotpan ahi;
Sarid a pat chun agamgi hi gamchom jep’a akiheiyin, Chishloth’tabor gamgi lang niso lama nisa hung sodohna lam ajontai.

Chuin Deb’erath lang ajon kit’in, Japhi’a langa akilhung touve; Japhi’a pat chun niso lam ahinlhah peh-in nisa hung sodoh ji na Gath ‘hephen gai, Eth’kazin geiyin ahung kilhung paiyin chuin Rim’mon chanin akilhung paikit’in Neah lang jonin ahung kiheikon tai.
Abanin sah lama agamgi chu Hannathon langa akiheiyin Iph’tahel phaiya abeitai.
Khopi ho chu Kattath ahin, Nahal’al ahin, Shimron ahin, Idalah ahin, chule Bethlehem toh ahi; khopi som le ni toh akhoneo jouse toh ahithai.
Hicheng hi Zebulun chate chan agam goulou ahin, ainsung dungjui uva khopi hicheng toh akhoneo jouse toh chantha ahiuve.
Vang kisan li lhinna chu Issachar din ahungdoh tan, ainsung dungjui uva Issachar chate chan ding ahitai.
Agamgi hop sunga chun Jezreel jong Chesul’loth jong Shunnem jong,
Haph’ara’im jong Shion jong Anaharath jong
Rabbith jong Kish’ion jong Ebez jong,
Remeth, Enga’nim jong Enhad’dah jong, Beth’pazzez jong ahopdoh tai;
agamgi chun Tabor jong Shahazu’man jong chule Beth’shemesh jong ahopan, Jordan vadunga chun agamgi abeitai. Khopi som le gup toh akhoneo jouse toh ahiye.
Hiche hi Issachar chate phung miho goulo achan diu ahin, ainsung dungjuiyun khopi chujat chutoh khoneo chengse toh achan tha tauve.
Vang kisan chu anga vei lhinnan ainsung tatoh bep’a Asher chate phung chan din ahungdoh tai.
Agam chun Helkath jong Hali jong, Beten jong, Ach’shaph jong,
Allam’melech jong Amad jong, chule Mishal jong ahoptai; nilhum lama Car’mel le Shihor-lib’nath jong ahopsoh keiyin.

Chuin agamgin niso lam ajot’in, Beth’dagon geiyin akilhungin, Zebulun leh Iph’tahel phai ahopan, sah lam alhah-in, Beth’emek le Nei’el geiyin akilhung lut’in ahi; chujouvin jong agamgi chu Cabul sah lama achen,
Ebron lam, Rehob lam, Hammon lam, Kanah lam ajonin, Sidon lenpa geiyin akilhung lut’e.
Hichun Ramah lama agamgi chu ahung kihei kit’in Tyre khopi kulpi kikai khum chu ahinpha peh-in ahi; chujouvin Hosah lam jonin akihei kit’in chule twilena atang tai. Mahalah jong Achzib jong,
Ummah jong, Aphek jong chule Rehob jong ahin, khopi somni le ni toh akhoneo jouse jong ahi.
Hiche hi ainsungu dunguiya Asher chate phung goulo gam ahin, khopi hijat hileh akhoneo jouse toh ahiye.
Vang kisan chu agup vei lhinnan ainsungu toh kithuh bep’in Naphtali chate phung chan dingin ahungdoh tai.
Agamgi chu Heleph a kipat, Zaanan’nim a pat chule Ad’ami’nekeb a pat, Jabneel a pat Lakkum chan geiyin akilhung lut peh-in, chuin Jordan vadunga atangtai.

Chujouvin agamgi chu nilhum lama akiheiyin, Aznoth’tabor lam ajonin chua konin Hukkoh lam ajon pai paiyin, lhanglama Zebulun ahopan, nilhum langa Asher gamgi ahopa kit’in, niso lama Jordan vadung ajuiyin ahi.
Kulpi kikai khum ho chu: Ziddim ahin, Zer ahin, Hammath ahin, Rakkath ahin, Chin’nereth ahi;
Ad’amah ahin, Ramah ahin, Razor ahi.
Kedesh ahin Edrei ahin, Enhazor ahi;
Yiron ahin, Migdalel ahin, Horem ahin, Beth’anath ahin chule Beth’shemesh ahi; khopi som le ko toh khoneo chengse toh ahiye.
Ainsungu toh kithuh bep’a hicheng hi Naphtali chate phung chan agamu ahi, khopi ho ahin khoneo ho ahin, akisim thai.
Asagi vei lhinna vang kisan chu ainsungu toh kithuh kham bep’in Dan chate phung din ahungdoh tan ahi.
Chule Dan phung chan agoulo gam chun khopi Zorah jong, Esh’ta’ol jong Ir’shemesh jong,
Sha’alab’hin jong, Aijolon jong, Ith’lah jong,
Elon jong, Timnathjong, Ekron jong ahin;
Eltekeh jong, Gib’bethon jong, Ba’alath jong,
Jehud jong, Bene’be’rak jong, Gath’rimmon jong,
chule Me’jar’kon le Rakkon toh Joppa to kimai ngat gamsungse se jong ahop soh keiyin ahi.

Dan chaten agamsung achanlou phat’uvin akon touvun, Leshem khopi agasat’uvin, alah jouvun chemjamin asat gam hel’uvin atouphauvin asunga acheng tauve; Leshem jong chu apau min aput sah-uvin Dan asah tauve.
Hicheng hi ainsung toh kham beh a Dan chate phung goulo achanu ahin, khopi ho jong khoneo ho jong ahithai.
Gamsung chu abih bih a gouloa chenpha dia akihopsoh hel phat’uvin, Israel chaten Nun chapa Joshua jong chu alah-uva goulo ding gam apeuvin ahi.
Pakai thusah-in Israelten Joshua chu athum pen pen khopi Timnath’serah kiti, Ephraim thinglhang gamsunga khopi chu apetauve; aman jong akhopi chu akisah phat’in chen nan aneitan ahi.

Goulo ding gam hijat hi Shiloh muna Pakai angsung laitah a Eleazar thempupa leh Nun chapa Joshua chule Israel chate apu apateu lhah a aphung khai khai leh ainsung dung juiyuva alamkai teuvin vang asanuva anahoppeh nau gam ahin kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phuriga anahop’u ahiye; hiti hin amahon agam ahomsoh tauve.
Pakaiyin, Joshua jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati.
“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang hi tin seiyin, ‘Keiman nangho dia Mose jah a kaseisa kiselna ding khopi ho lhenguvin,
lungtupna neilouva khutsoiya mi that auma ahileh hiche khopi dunga chun jamlut nante. Hitia chu khopi ho hi thisan phu la nompa masanga kiselna pang ding ahiuve.

Mithatpa chu kiselna khopi khat pen pena jamlut ding, akhopi kelkot phunga ding dena, akhopi sunga upa ho koma achung chang thu aseipeh ding, chutengle amah on khopi sunga apuilut’uva apansatna ding mun apeh-uva chule ama chu akomuva umden ding ahi.
Thisan phulah nompan ahin nungdela ahijongle, kho upa hon mithatpa chu phulah nompa khut’a apeh doh lou diu ahiye; ijeh-inem itile agol atha chu masanga kidoupina neilouva, khutsoiya atha ahibouve.

Hoi hijongle mithatpa chu athu kitan dinga khoppi angsunga adin masangsea khopi sunga kona potdoh louhela umden ding ahi alhailut pet’a akhopia thempu chungnungpa thi kahsea um umjengding ahitai. Thempu chungnungpa thi teng vangleh ahung jamdohna kholen ama kho ma ma ainlama mithatpa chu kile kit thei ding ahi,’ tin seipeh-in,” ati.

Hijeh chun Israel chatenjong Galilee gamsunga Naphtali thinglhang gama din Kedesh khopi alhengdoh-uvin, Ephraim thinglhang gama din Shechem alhengdoh tauve; chule Judah thinglhang gama din jong Hebron kiti Kir’iath’arba jong kiti alhengdoh tauvin ahi.

Jordan vadunggal Jericho niso lama din dokhang do banga kido gammang, Bezer khopi alhenguvin, Reuben phung din Gilead gama Ramoth alhenguvin, Gad phung din Bushan gamsunga Golan alhenguvin, Manas’seh phung din jong anganseuve.

Khopi hichengse hi Israel chate jouse leh alah-uva hung kholjin kholgam mi, koi hijongleh lung tupna neilouva mithat pen pen chu hiche khopi dunga ajam lut’a ahileh, khoppi angsunga athu akitan na dia adin kahsea thisan phu la nompa khut’a athilouna ding ahi.
Levite lah a apu apau insung kailhah a phung upa chengse Eleazar thempupa heng leh Nun chapa Joshua heng chule Israel chate apu apau insung kailhah a phung upa chengseu henga ahunguvin;

Canaan gamsunga Shiloh muna chun ajah-uva ahung seiyun, “Keiho jong hi kachenna diu khopi ho jong neipeh-uva chule kagancha vahna diu hamhing gam jong neipeh diuva Pakaiyin Mose anahilsa ahi,” ahung tiuve.
Hijeh chun Pakai thusah dungjuiyin Israel chaten Levi ho jong chu anoiya kisei khopi chengse hitoh, hamhing gam chengse hi Israel chate gamsung agoulouva konin apedoh tauve.

Vang kisan chu Kohath phung mite insung din ahung phai. Hitobang hin Aaron thempupa chilhah Levi mite chun Judah phunga jong Simeon phunga’jong chule Benjamin phunga jong khopi som le thum chu vang kisan dungjuiya akilah cheh-u ahi.
Kohath chate amoh chengsen jong vang kisan dungjuiyin Ephraim phung mite inkoa kon leh Dan phunga kon, chule Manas’seh phung keh khat’a kon chun khopi som akilah tauve.
Gershon chaten jong vang kisanpeh dungjuiyin Issachar phung inkoa kon leh Asher phunga kon Naphtali phunga kon, chule Bashan gama Manas’seh phungkeh khat’a konin khopi som lethum akilah-uvin ahi.
Merari miten jong ainsungu toh kithuh bep’in Reuben phung a konle Gad phunga kon chule Zebulun phunga konin khopi som le ni aki lah tauve.
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh dungjuiya Israel chate khopi hichengse hileh hamhing gam hicheng hi vang kisan peh bang banga Levite anapeh-u ahiye.
Judah phunga kon le Simeon phunga konin Israel chaten abana amin cheh a kiseidoh khopi chengse hi Levite anapeuvin ahi.
Akhopi chengse hi Aaron chilhah ho, Kohath chate insung leh Levi miho ma ma, insung khat achang tauve, ajeh chu vang kisan chu amaho dia hung pha masa ahi.
Israel chaten amaho chu Kir’iath’arba kiti, hichea Arba hi Anak pa ahin, akhopi Hebron jong kiti, Judah thinglhang gama khopi le akimvela hamhing gam chengse chu apetauve.
Khopi loujao chengse le akhoneo ho vang chu Jephun’neh chapa Caleb chen pha dinga kipesa ahitai.
Aaron thempupa chilhah te chu Israel chaten mithat ho kiselna khopi Hebron le ahamhing gamsung jouse apeuvin, Libnah le ahamhing gam pumpi jong apeuve;
Jattir khopi le ahamhing gam apeuvin, Eshtemo’a khopi le ahamhing gam jong apeuvin ahi;
Holon le ahamhing gam jouse apeuvin, Debir le hamhing gam jong apeh thauve;
A’in khopi le ahamhing gam sung apeh thauvin, Juttah le ahamhing gam jong apeuve; Beth’shemesh le ahamhing apeh thauvin, hiti chun hiche phung ni sunga kon hin khopi ko apedoh tauve.
Benjamin phunga konin Gibeon khopi le ahamhing gamjong apeuvin, Geba le ahamhing gam jong apeuvin;
Anathoth khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se toh apumin Almon khopi le ahamhing gamsungse jong apeuvin ahi.
Aaron thempupa chilhah achate chan khopi chengse chu abonchan khopi som le thum toh ahamhing gam sungse toh ahithan ahi.
Levi mite lah a Kohath insung mi, Kohath chate amoh chengse chu Epharaim phunga konin achandiu khopi akihop peh tai.
Hiche Kohath chate amoh chengse chu mithat ho kiselna ding khopi Shechem le ahamhing gamsung, Ephraim thinglhang gamsung chu apeuvin, Gezer khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeuvin ahi.
Kib’za’im khopi le ahamhing gam jong apeuvin, Beth’horon khopi le ahamhing gam jong apeuve; khopi li alhingin ahi.
Chule Dan phunga konin El’teke khopi le ahamhing gam apeuvin, Geb’bethon khopi le ahamhing gam apeuve;
Ai’jalon khopi le ahamhing gam jong apeuvin, Gath’rimmon le ahamhing gam jong apeuve, khopi li ma alhingtai.
Manas’seh phunga koninjong Ta’anach khopi le ahamhing gam apeuvin, Gath’rimmon khopi le ahamhing gam apeuve; hijeh chun khopi ni alhinge.
Kohath chate amoh chengse insung mite chan khopi chu abonchan khopi som khat le ahamhing gam jouse toh ahithai.

Levite inko lah a insung khat Gershon chate jong chu Manas’seh phung keh khat a konin achan diu apeuvin, Bashan gamsungse Golan khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se apeuve; hiche khopi jong mithat ho kiselna khopima ahi, chule Be’esh’terah khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong ahin, khopi ni hi apeuvin ahi.
Chujongle Issachar phunga konin jong Kish’ion khopi le ahamhing gamsung apeuvin, Dab’erath khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se jong apeuve.
Chule Jarmuth khopi le ahamhing gamsung apeuvin, En’gan’mim khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeh thauvin ahile, khopi li alhingtai.
Asher phunga konin jong Mishal khopi le ahamhing gam jong apeuvin, Abdon khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeuve;
Helkath khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeuvin, chule Rehob khopi le ahamhing gam jong apeuvin ahileh, khopi li ma alhingin ahi;

Naphtali phung sunga konin jong Galilee gamsunga Kedesh khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeuvin, hiche khopi jong hi mithat ho kiselna khopi ma ahi; Ham’moth’dor le ahamhing gamsung jong apeuvin, chule Kartan khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeh thauvin, abonin khopi thum alhingtai.
Gershon chate inko chujat dinga khopi kipeh doh chengse chu abonchan khopi som le thum alhingin ahamhing gamsungse se toh ahitha cheh-in ahi.
Levite lah a mi aum nalai, Merari chate inkose se chu Zebulun phunga konin achandiu akipen, Jok’neam khopi le ahamhing gamsung apeuvin, Kartah khopi le ahamhing gamsung apeuve;
Dimnah khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se apeuvin, Nahal’al khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeuve, abonin khopi li alhingin ahi.
Reuben phunga konin jong Bezer khopi le ahamhing gamsung chu apeuvin, Jahaz khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se jong apeuve;
Ked’emoth khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se apeuvin, chule Meph’a-ath khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se jong apeuvin ahileh, khopi li alhingtai.
Gad phunga konin jong Gilead gamsunga Ramoth khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se apeuvin, hiche khopi jong hi mithat ho kiselna khopi ma ma ahiye; Mahana’im khopi le ahamhing gamsung jong apeuvin,
Heshbon khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se jong apeuvin, Jazer khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se apeuvin ahileh abonin khopi li alhingin ahi.
Merari chate inko chujatpi Levi inkote lah a aum nalai ho dia kipedoh khopi chengse abonchan khopi som le ni alhingin ahi.
Israel chate lah a Levite khopi chengse chu abonin khopi som li le get alhingin, ahamhing gamsungse se toh ahitha cheh-in ahi.
Khopi hijat chun akimvel khopam dunga hamhing gam aneicheh-uvin, hitobang a hi khopi chujat chu chang soh hel ahiuve.
Hitobang hin apu apateu henga akihahselna bang bangin Pakaiyin Canaan gam pumpi chu Israelte apetai; Israelten jong agam pumpi chu atouphauvin acheng tauve.

Chujongleh apu apateu henga akihahselna bang chun Pakaiyin Israelte chu ajet aveiyuva mitea konin akicholdo sahtai; agalteu khat’a khat jeng cha jong amaho ting tan jouvah abeihel tan ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin agalteu abonchan akhut’uva apedohtai.
Pakaiyin Israel insung dinga thupha ateppeh chengse chu khat cha alhinglel abeihelin, abonchan athutep chengse aguilhung soh keiye.
Joshua’n Reuben chate le Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat chu akoukhomin,
chule ajah-uva aseitai, “Nang hon Pakai lhachapa Mose’n nathupeh jouse abonchan nanitsoh keiyun, keiman nangho kaseipeh kathusei jouse jong na-ngaitauve;
nikho hijat sung hin tuni geiyin nang hon nasopiteu jong nadalha deh pouvin, Pakai na-Pathenuvin nathu peh joh-u chu nanit tupna diuvin nakichih them lheh jenguve.

Tun vang Pakai na-Pathenuvin athutep bang bangin nasopiteuva kona jong nakichol do diu aphatsah tai, hijeh chun tun kiheiyun lang Jordan gal lama Pakai lhachapa Mose’n napeh nau gam, nangho chenna gamsung nagoulou, na-inlamu jonin chetauvin.

Pakai lhachapa Mose’n nathupeh-u danthu chu nanit jingna diuvin ching theiyun; Pakai na-Pathenu na-ngailut’uva ama lamlhah jouse najui them’uva athupeh chengse nanit’uva, ama jeng nakolchah jinguva, chule nalungthim pumpiu le nahinkho pumpiuva ama kin jeng nabol diu nagin diu ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun Joshua’n amaho chu phatthei abohin, aboh jou phat’in asoldoh tai, amaho jong ainlamuva achetauve.

Manas’seh phung akeh khat chu Bashan gamsunga Mose’n aclian diu gam anapehsa ahin, Manas’seh phung keh khatma chu Joshua’n Jordan vadung gal nilhum lam, asopiteu Israel dang ho lah a chenmun anapeh ahiye. Amaho chu Joshua’n ainlamuva asoldoh phat’in abonchauvin phatthei abohsoh keiyin ahi;

ajah-uva Joshua’n hitin ati, “Gou tampi gancha tamtah le dangka tam pi sana ahin, sum-eng ahin, chule thih hijeng jongle ponsil geiyin tampi kipoh-uvin na-inlam jontauvin, chule hiche nagalteu thil thang nachomdoh chengseu chu nasopiteu toh kihomuvin,” ati.

Hijeh chun Reuben chate le Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat chu ainlamuva ahung kile kit’uvin, Canaan gamsunga Shiloh muna chun Israel chate toh akilhauvin, Pakaiyin Mose ahilna banga achen phasau agam sungu Gilead gamsung jonin achetauve.

Jordan gal don Canaan gamsunga lhang khat ahung geiphat uvin Reuben chate le Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat chun, Jordan pang lhanga chun maicham khat asemun, amaicham semu chu lentah ahiye.

Israel chaten athilsemu chu ajahdoh phat’uvin hitin aseiyui, “Ven, Reuben chate le Gad chate, chule Manas’seh phung keh khat chun Canaan gam mong chin Jordan vapang lhang chung khat Israel chate gamsunga khun maicham asemtauve,” atiuvin ahi.
Athudol hi Israel chaten ajah doh phat’uvin Shiloh muna cheng Israel chate khoppi pumpi akikhomuvin amaho chu gala sat tho din agotauve.
Israel chaten Gilead gamsunga Reuben chate le Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat henga chun mi asolun, amisolu chu Eleazar thempupa chapa Phin’ehas kiti toh ahin,
ama kilhonpi mi chu Israel phung lah a insung khat kai lhah a upa cheh, Israel insung phung khat cheh a kona kilhengdoh phung upa cheh mi som khat toh ahiuve.
Amaho chu Gilead gam Reuben chate le Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat henga ahunguvin ajah-uva ahung seiyun, hitin atiuve,

“Pakai khoppi amiten hitin aseiyun, ‘Ipi dinga nanghon tulaiya hi Israel Pathen douna thil naboluva, Pakai nung najui dauva naki heimang jenguva nacham chama maicham nakisemjenguva Pakai dou mah nabolu hitam?
Pe’or muna ichonsetnau jong phaset nasah louvu ham, hichea kona bon ithensoh jou loulaiyu hilou ham? Hiche ichonset jeh-uva jong chu Pakai khoppi mipi chunga jong gamna hise ana langsa ahi,

tuni geiya jong nangho hitobanga hi iti Pakai dehlha a naki-hei mang jeng diu hitam? Tuni jenga jong nang hon Pakai doumah nabol uva ahileh ama chu Israel khoppi pumpi chung jenga jong hung lung hang jeng ding ahi.

Nachen nau gamsung athen louva ahijongleh hung galkaiyun lang Pakai houbuh kisonna gamsung Pakai gamsunga khun keiho lah a hung chengjeng uvin; Pakai doumah hi nabol louhel diu, Pakai i-Pathenu maicham aumsa tailouva nacham nachama nakisem thu’uva keiho geiya doumah bol neiso lo hel dingu ahi.
Suhmang dia kikatdoh sa thilho chunga Achan kitipa Zerah chapan toh khel aneiya chu Israel khoppi pumpi chunga lung han na hung chu jengsa hilou ham?,’ tin aseiyuve,” a hung tiuve.
Israel phung sunga insung mi upa ho donbut nan Reuben chate le Gad chate, chule Manas’seh phung keh khat chun aseiyun,
“Hat chung nungpa Pathen Pakai, Hat chungnungpa Pathen Pakai amanbou ahet ahi! Kathil bolu hi doumah lam ahitah a Pakai dinga tahsan suhbeina ahi dingleh keiho hi tunin nei hing hoi da jenguvin;

chuti monga maicham khat semdoh jeh a Pakai nung juiya kona kihei mangna ahi mong ding leh, ahilouva keihon hiche maicham chunga hi pumgo thil hihen lang lhosoh thilto hijongleh chamna thilto hijongle kato’uva ahivangleh Pakaiyin kachunguva phu la jeng hen.
Ahipoi keihon tijat mana kabolu ahibouve, khonung teng nachateuvin kachateu jah a aseiyuva, ‘Nang hon Pakai Israel Pathen chu i-nalo nadiu ham?

Ajeh chu nangho toh ikahuva Pakaiyin Jordan vadung hi gamgia asemsa ahitai, nangho Reuben chate leh Gad chate, nang hon Pakaiya chan nanei pouve, ati theiyu ahi; hitobanga hi nachateuvin kachateu hi Pakai ahousah da mai theiyu ahi.
Hiche jeh a chu keihon Pumgo thilto gona ding hihih hen lang, kilhaina gantha na ding hi hih jongle maicham khat semu hitin,

hichun keiho leh nangho kah a hettoh sah-in pangin tin, chujongle eiho nunga khangthah te kah a jong hettohsah nan hung pangin tin, keihon jong Pakai angsunga ama kin kabol mong monguvin pumgo thilto jong kilhaina gantha jong chule chamna thilto gantha jong kabol nauve, ti hettohsah-in hung pang nante, katiu ahi; achuti louva ahileh khonung phat leh nachateuvin keiho chate jah a ahinseiyuva “Nanghon Pakaiya chan naneipouve,” ahinti tei diu ahi, tia kabolu ahi.

Chujongleh keiho geldola chu khonung teng keiho jah hihen katu kachateu jah hijongle hitobanga hi akiseiya ahileh, ‘Veuvin, nangho leh keiho kah a hettohsah a pang dinga pumgo thilto kitona jong hilou, kilhaina ganthana maicham jong hilou, Pakai dinga kapu kapateu semsa maicham khu,’ tin kiseinan te katiu ahi.

Itih hijongle keihon Pakai doumah kabol louhel diu ahin, chujongle Pakai i-Pathenu maicham ama houbuh maiya kitung tailouva keihon kacham chamuva pumgo thilto tona ding le lhosoh thilto to na ding chule kilhaina ganthana dia maicham kasemuva Pakai nunga kona kaki-heimang louhel diu ahi!” atiuve.

Phin’ehas thempupa le akilhonpi khoppi lamkai ho leh Israel insung jouse phung upa chengsen thu kiseiho, Reuben chate leh Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat thusei ho ajah phat’uvin alungu alhaitai.

Hijeh chun Eleazar thempupa chapa Phin’ehas chun Reuben chate Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat jah a aseipeh-in, I-lah-uva Pakai acheng jingnai, ti keihon tunin kahetauve, ijeh-inem itileh nang hon adounan thilse hitobang chu nabol hih lai nauve; chujeh chun nang hon Pakai khut’a konin jong Israel chate hi nahuhdoh tauve,” atin ahi.

Chujouvin Eleazar them pupa chapa Phin’ehas le lamkai ho chu Gilead gamsung, Reuben chate le Gad chate koma konin Canaan gam lam, Israel chate heng lama ahung kile kit’uvin, Israelte henga thu ahin lhut tauve.

Athu lhut’u chun Israel chate alung damsah tai; chuphat’in Israel chaten jong Pathen “Vahchoiyun, amaho douna galbol ding jong asei tapouvin, Reuben chate le Gad chate chenna gamsung suhmang ding jong aseipoh kit tapouve.
Reuben chate le Gad chaten maicham asemsau chu ‘Hettohsah’ atiuve; amahon aseiyun, “Ijeh ham itileh Pakai hi Pathen ahimonge, tia hiche maicham hi eiho le amaho kah a hettohsah a pang ahi,” atiuve.
Pakaiyin Israelte chu akimvel’uva agalte chengseuva kona akicholdo sah nung phat sottah nungin, Joshua jong atehse lheh jengin akum jong atam lheh jengtai,

hijeh chun Joshua’n jong Israel pumpi, aupa chengseu ahin, aphung lamkai teu ahin, athutan avaihom hou jong, vaihoma pang jouse jong abonchan akou khomsoh keiyin ajah-uva aseitai, “Tun keima kateh tan ka kum jong a tam lheh tai,
nangho khohsah jala Pakai na-Pathen uvin namtin vaipi hijat abolna jong nang hon namusoh kei tauve; ijehinem itileh nangho dia galsat a pang chu Pakai na-Pathenu ama ahiye.
Veuvin keiman tua aum nalai vaipi hijat jong khu Jordan vadunga pat nilhum lam Twikhanglen lenjopa geiya kasuh mangsa namtin vaipi chujat chutoh naphung phunga nagoulo diuva kahoppeh nahitauve.
Amaho jong khu Pakai na-Pathen uvin namasang namitmu pet tah-uva anunguva adel mangsoh ding ahi chuteng nang hon Pakai na-Pathenun nateppeh banguva agam khu chenna nanei diu ahiye.
Hiche jeh chun Mose danthua kisun chengse chu nanit’a nabolsoh keina dingun gen ngaiyun gun chun, hiche danthua kon hin jetlam hihen lang veilam hijongle kiheidoh din gel dauvin;

chuti hen lang hileh hiche namtin vaipi hijat nalah-uva cheng den ho to jong hin nachen hal thei louhel diu amaho pathen lim semthu ho jong hi namin phah thei lou diu kihahselna jong nanei dauva, akin jong nabolda diu, nacham tah-uva jong hiche ho koma hi nabohkhup thei louhel diu ahi.
Chusanga tulaiya nachon nau bang banga Pakai na-Pathen joh-u nakolchah jing jeng thei diu ahi.
Amongin jong Pakaiyin namasang uva namtin vaipi nasa tah tah le hat tah tah ho anodoh tai, hiti chun nangho doudin tuni gei hin koimacha a pang jouva aumtapoi.
Aman nangho nathutep bang bangun Pakai na-Pathenun nangho din gal nasat peh-uvin, hijeh chun nangho mi khatseh seh-in jong midang sang khat cheng nadel jam jouvui.
Pakai naPathenu na-ngailutjingna diuvin nangho natahsa tah uva, phate cha nakichih thei diu ahi.

Ajeh chu nangho naki le heiyuva, nalah-uva kihinghoi nam dang mi amoh chengse toh nakiti mat’uva, amaho khu toh kichento kijonto naboluva, nang bon anumei hou nakipuiyuva, amahon jong nangho numeiho akipuiyuva ahileh.

phate chan kihet masah dim demun Pakai na-Pathenuvin nangho masanga hiche namtin vaipi khu adelmang jom louhel ding ahi, amaho khu nangho dia na thanguva panga nangho kipalna pang diu, Pakai na-Pathenuvin napeh nau hiche gamsung phatah a kona naman thah kahseuva, namit changuva ling le khao banga kikam diu ahi.

“Tun keima leiset dalha koncha kahitai, nang hon vang nalungthimu leh nahinkhouva, nabonchauva hi Pakai naPathenuvin nachung changuva athutep chengse hi abonchan khat’a khat jeng chajong alolhinglel aum tapoi, ti nahetsoh keiyu ahi; abonchan ahung guilhung dim demin, aguilhung lou aumpoi.

Ahivangin hitobanga nachung changuva Pakai na-Pathenin athutep thilpha chujat agui lhunsah banga chu Pakaiyin hiche gampha tah, Pakai na-Pathen’uvin napeh nau gamsunga kona hi nasuh gamhel kahseuva Pakaiyin thilse hijat hi nachunguva ahinpoh lut ding ahi.

Nang ho nathupeh sau Pakai na-Pathen kitepna hi nasuh khelnauva, pathen chom chom lim kisem thu ho henga na valut a hiche ho kinbola napana akomuva nobohkhup ‘uva ahileh, nangho dounan Pakai lung hanna hung deujah jengin tin, aman napehsau gamsung phatah a kona hi naman thah jeng diu ahi,” ati.

Joshua’n Israel phung abonchan Shechem khoa akhomsoh keiyin; aupa jouseu le aphung upa jouseu thutan vaihom ho le aphung upa jouseu Israel vaibol jouse akoukhom soh keitai, amaho jong ki-engbol cheh-in Pathen angsunga akilahsoh keiyuve.

Joshua’n mipi abonchauva jah a aseitai, “Pakai Israel PaPathenin hitin aseiye ‘Napului te niu Abraham le Nahor pa Terah chu khanglui laiyin Euphrates luigala achenguvin chujongle amahon pathen lim sem thu ho jeng anajen leuve.
Chuin keiman napu u Abraham chu luipi pang gal lama pat’in kahin puiyin Canaan gam pumpia kapui le soh keiyin, ason achilhah tam pi kaphah sah tai. Isaac jong chapan kapen sah-in,
Chule Isaac chu Jacob le Esau kahin sah kit’e; Esau achenna din thinglhang gamsung kapen, Jacob le achate vang chu Egypt gama achesuh tauve.
Chujouvin Mose le Aaron kasol’in, Egypt gam chu a gam lailung tah a gamna hise kalansah-e; anung chun keiman nangho kahin puidoh tai.

Hiti hin keiman napu napateu chu Egypt gama konin kahin puidoh-in Twikhanglen pang nahung lhung tauve, ahin Egypt miten sakol tamtah le kangtalai tampi amangun, napu napateu ahin deluvin Twikhanglen san pang geiyin ahindel lut tauve.

Chuin napu napateu jong Pakai henga ataovun aka jenguva ahileh, Pakaiyin nangho le Egypt mite kah a mu athimsah-in, chule Twikhanglen twipi chu Egypt mite chunga alon khumsah jengin, achup mangsoh tai; chujongle Egypt gamsunga kachaloh kathilbol namit’a namusau ahitai; chujouvin gamthip laiya phat sotpi natham kit tauve.

Chuin keiman nangho hi Jordan vadung gal lang khat’a cheng Amor mite gam sung geiyin kahinpui lut kit’in ahileh, Amor miten galin nahin satjengtauvin, ahivangin keiman abonchauvin nangho khut’a kapedoh soh keiyin, chule namasanguva amaho kasuh gam bel phat’in agamsungu natou phauvin, chennan nanei tauve.
Chujouvin jong Moab lengpa Zippor chapa Balak kitipa chu ahung kipat kit’ in Israel dounan gal ahin boltai; Balak hin nangho gaosap din mi asolin Be’or chapa Balaam agakousah-e.
Ahivangin Balaam thusei chu keiman kanoppeh pon, hijeh chun aman nangho phatthei naboh jotauve, hiti chun keiman Balak khut’a konin jong nangho kahuhdoh kit tai.

Chuin nangho Jordan nagal kaiyuvin Jericho khopi nahung lhung tauve; Jericho miten nangho nakisatpi kit’uvin, Amor mite jong, Perez mite jong, Canaan mite jong, Hit mite jong Girgash mite jong, Hivi mite jong chule Jebus miten jong nakisatpi soh keiyuvin ahi. Ahivangin ken abonchauvin nangho khut’a kapedoh sohkeiye.

Keiman namasanguva khoingal kalensah-in, khoingalte chun nangho masanga miho adeljam peh jengin, Amor miho lengte ni geiyin jong adeljam tai; hijeh chun nangma chemjam hemhat vang leh nathalchang hat vangahipoi.

Nangman nathahat a nakiholdoh louhel gamsung chu keiman nangho kamoh peh ahin, chujongle nasat khah louhelu khopi chujatpi jong chu kapeh-uva asunga chengah nahiu ahitai, chujongle lengpilei nabol louhelu leh Olive thinglei nabol louhelu jong aga naneh-u ahitai,’ ati.

“Hijeh chun tun Pakai hi gingun lang gunchu tah le kitah tah-in ama kin jeng boluvin, luipi gal gamsung le Egypt gama napu napateuvin anahou pathen chom chom lim kisem thu ho chu paidoh soh heluvin, Pakai kin jeng bou bol jo’uvin.

Namit vet’uva Pakai kin bol ding pha nasah louhel’uva ahileh ipi pen tah kin bola napan diu ham, tunin kilhen jengun, luipi gala napu hou napa houvu nahouvu pathen lim semthu ho nahou diu ha, nachen nau gamsunga Amor mite pathen lim semthu ho joh nahou diu ham? Keile ka-insung miten vang Pakai kinjeng kabol diu ahi,” ati.
Chutah chun Israel mipin adonbut’un aseitauve, “Iti nama jongle keihon Pakai chu kadalhah-uva pathen lim semthu ho kinbola kapan louhel diu ahi,

ijeh inem itileh keiho jong kapu kapateu jong Egypt gam kihenna ina kona eihinpuidoh-uva chu Pakai ka-Pathenu ama mong mong ahibouve, hiche Pakai Pathen hin keiho mitmu changtah a jong melchihna nasa tah tah abola, kachena lam lamuva kahin jotpau mitin vaipi chujat lah a chu eihin hoitup-u ahiye,

chujongle Pakaiyin hiche gamsunga anacheng mitin vaipi chujat, Amor mite jong kamasanguva adeldoh soh ahi, hiche jeh a hi keihon jong Pakai kinjeng kaboluva ama bou kahou diu ahibouve, ijeh-inem itileh ama mong mong hi keiho Pathen ahi,” ati cheh tauve.

Ahivangin Joshua’n mipi jah a aseipeh in “Nang ho Pakai kin bol alhacha a napan thei lou diu ahi, ipijeh-inem itileh ama hi Pathen theng tah ahin, Pathen tom ngaitah ahibouve, amahin nasuh khelu hijatpi leh nachonset jouseu moh ngaidam ponte.

Ipijehinem itileh nang hon Pakai hi nadalhahuva gamchom mite pathen lim semthu pou nahouvuva ahileh, Pakai hungin tin nangho dia thilse nabolpeh diu, thilpha nabolpeh sau hijatpi nunga hi, namoh bahgam hel diu ahi,” ati.
Hichun mipin Joshua jah a aseiyun, “Ahipoi, keihon Pakai bou kahou diu ahi,” atiuve.

Chuphatin Joshua’n jong Israel mipi jah a aseipeh-in “Ahileh Pakai ama chubou nahou diuva nangho tah-in nadeiya naki lhenu ahitai, ti hi nangho dia nangho ma ma hettohsah a pang nahiu ahitai, ong?” atileh amahon jong “Keiho le keiho hettohsah kahi jengui,” atiuve.
“Chuti ahileh tun nalah-uva nakoiyu gamdang mite pathen lim semthu ho chu paidoh-uvin lang Pakai Israel Pathen lama nalungthim pe jeng tau,” atileh;
Israel mipin Joshua jah a aseipeh-uvin, “Itijongleh keihon Pakai ka-Pathenu chu kahou tei teiyuva chule ama kamcheng bou ka-ngai diu ahiye,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Joshua’n jong hiche nikho hin mipi dingin kitepna khat asemdoh-in, Shechem khopia chun mipi din chonna ding dan jouse leh chondan ding jouse asemdoh peh tai.
Adan semdoh chengse chu abonchan Joshua’n athu kisei jouse Pathen danthu lekhabua ajihsoh keiyin, chujongleh songtum lentah khat alan, Pakai munthenga Gangpi phung noiya chun aphutdoh tai.

Chujouvin Joshua’n jong mipi abonchauva jah a aseipeh in, “Vetan hiche song kiphut hi eiho chunga hettohsah a pang jing ding ahi, ijeh-inem itile hiche song hin, Pahiyin eiho jah a asei thucheng jouse chu aboncha ajahsoh kei ahin, hijeh a chu hiche song hi eiho chunga hettohsah a pang ding ahi, achutilouva ahileh nanghon na-Pathenu chu joule nala naboljeng theiyu ahi,” atipeh-e.
Hiche jou hin Joshua’n mipi chu ama ama goulo gamsung cheh a asolsoh kit tai.
Thilsoh hijat nung hin Pakai lhachapa, Nun chapa Joshua chu akum kum ja khat le kum som alhinin athitai.
Israel chaten Joshua long chu ama gamsungma ma Tim’nath’serah kiti lai Ephraim thing lhang gamsunga Ga’ash lama chun avuitauve.
Israel chun Joshua hinlai sungse leh Joshua sanga thi nu khah ahivanga Israel dinga Pakai thilbol hesa upa ho hinlaise sen Pakai ana hou nauve.

Israel chaten Egypt gama kona Joseph gubuh ahinpoh doh chengseu chu Shechem khopi Shechempa Hamor chapate henga Jacob’in dangka ja khat man a anachohsa leimun a chun avuitauve, hiche lei mun hi Joseph chilhah ason atute achate goulo gamsung ahitai.
Aaron chapa Eleazar jong athitan, Israel chaten along chu Gib’eah kiti lai, Gib’eah chapa Phin’ehas kitipa kipesa kholen khat Ephraim thinglhang gamsung ma mah avuitauvin ahi.
